steps.action: Load samples/file_a.csv and samples/file_b.csv; configure key/comparison mapping; run compare
steps.expected: Step 3 renders Summary card + Filter bar + Detailed results table
steps.observed: Step 3 rendered all three sections with 5 result rows
POST /api/sessions/9985a0ff-7cd8-42b2-afb1-c283c75ee278/compare -> 200

steps.expected: Summary object contains totals and bucket counts
steps.observed: summary={total_rows_a:4,total_rows_b:4,matches:2,mismatches:1,missing_left:1,missing_right:1}
UI showed File A 4 rows, File B 4 rows, Matches 2, Mismatches 1, Only in File B 1, Only in File A 1

steps.action: Validate normal comparable case on baseline dataset
steps.observed: UI displayed 40% and 2 of 5 rows
UI displayed 0%, 0 of 0 rows, and 'No comparable rows' helper text

assertions.title: Ignored-rows banner conditional on unkeyed counts

steps.observed: No ignored banner rendered

steps.action: Complex compare with unkeyed_left=1 and unkeyed_right=1
steps.expected: Ignored banner visible with count summary
steps.observed: Banner rendered: 'Ignored rows' and '1 in File A, 1 in File B'

assertions.title: Duplicate-keys banner conditional on duplicates counts

steps.action: Baseline compare with duplicates_a=0 and duplicates_b=0
steps.observed: No duplicate banner rendered

steps.action: Complex compare with duplicates_a=2 and duplicates_b=2
steps.observed: Banner rendered: 'Duplicates found: 2 in File A, 2 in File B'

assertions.title: Filter bar exposes eight buckets with aria-pressed and counts

steps.action: Inspect filter bar controls via agent-browser snapshot -i
steps.expected: Buttons in order: All, Matches, Mismatches, Only in File B, Only in File A, Ignored in File B, Ignored in File A, Duplicates
steps.observed: Snapshot returned all eight buttons in exact order with count badges
Active bucket reflected current selection (All or Duplicates depending on step)

steps.action: Run complex compare and capture result_types
steps.expected: Counts derive from result_type distribution and duplicate aggregation
steps.observed: resultTypes included unkeyed_right, unkeyed_left, duplicate_file_a, duplicate_file_b, duplicate_both, match, mismatch, missing_left, missing_right

steps.action: Compare UI badge counts to computed counts
steps.observed: UI counts matched expected exactly: all=11, match=1, mismatch=3, missing_left=1, missing_right=1, unkeyed_left=1, unkeyed_right=1, duplicate=3

evidence.network: Computed-from-compare vs UI counts matched; duplicate bucket aggregated duplicate_file_a + duplicate_file_b + duplicate_both

steps.expected: Button aria-pressed=true and table limited to mismatch rows
steps.observed: Mismatches button became active and table showed only mismatch row
Counter showed '1 of 1 rows shown' for mismatch-filtered view

assertions.title: Duplicate filter aggregates all three v2 duplicate variants

steps.action: Run complex compare containing duplicate_file_a, duplicate_file_b, duplicate_both
steps.expected: All three duplicate variants present in compare response
steps.observed: Response contained all three duplicate variants

steps.expected: Badge count equals sum of all duplicate variants and rows from each variant are shown
steps.observed: Duplicates badge showed 3 and rows displayed all three variant-specific descriptions

evidence.network: compare result_types included duplicate_file_a, duplicate_file_b, duplicate_both; Duplicates count=3

steps.action: Set filter to All and type search query 'robert'
steps.expected: Rows whose combined searchable text includes query remain
steps.observed: Only mismatch row with File B value 'Robert' remained visible
Counter updated to '1 of 5 rows shown'

steps.action: Keep search query 'robert' and switch filter to 'Only in File A'
steps.observed: No rows matched intersection

steps.expected: Show 'No results match the current filter and search.'
steps.observed: Exact empty-state message rendered

assertions.title: Column headers sort ascending then descending

steps.expected: First click ascending, second click descending
steps.observed: aria-sort switched Type: ascending -> descending and row order inverted
Type aria-sort=none, Key aria-sort=ascending, key order 1..5

steps.expected: Sort numerically by differences.length asc then desc
steps.observed: Asc placed 0-diff rows before 1-diff row; desc placed 1-diff row first

frictions.description: CSV upload targets are hidden input[type=file] elements; role=button dropzones are not directly uploadable by agent-browser upload command.
frictions.resolution: Uploaded fixtures by selecting hidden file inputs (input#<id>) discovered via DOM eval.

summary: Tested 12 assertions (VAL-RESULTS-001..012): 12 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Summary/filter behaviors, duplicate aggregation, search/filter interplay, and sort semantics matched contract expectations.
